summary: Phase D Content Engine Testing - Iteration 204. Backend: 22/22 tests passed covering content generation (single/bulk), admin content center (list/filter/update/archive), sales/affiliate feeds, and dynamic pricing validation. Frontend: Admin Content Center page verified with KPI row (220 total, 80 sales, 123 affiliate), filters, table with TZS pricing, preview drawer with edit capability. Sales Dashboard 'Content to Share Today' block verified with product cards, caption panel (Quick Caption, Professional, Closing Script), and Copy buttons. Content Center correctly appears in admin sidebar under 'Growth & Affiliates'. KEY VALIDATION PASSED: Captions contain real TZS amounts from promotion engine (e.g., 'TZS 95,000', 'save TZS 5,000') - NOT hardcoded templates.
seed_data_creation: Content items auto-generated via bulk generate buttons during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase D Content Engine is complete and verified. Key points: 1) POST /api/content-engine/generate creates single content item with dynamic pricing from product_promotion_enrichment service. 2) POST /api/content-engine/generate-bulk creates multiple items for products with active promotions. 3) GET /api/admin/content-center returns items with KPIs (total_content, sales_content, affiliate_content, active_campaigns). 4) PUT /api/admin/content-center/{id} updates headline/captions. 5) POST /api/admin/content-center/{id}/archive archives content. 6) GET /api/staff/content-feed returns sales role content. 7) GET /api/partner/affiliate-content-feed returns affiliate role content. 8) Frontend AdminContentCenterPage.jsx has data-testid attributes for all key elements. 9) SalesContentBlock.jsx shows 'Content to Share Today' with card selection and caption copy buttons. 10) Content Center is in sidebar under 'Growth & Affiliates' section.
